title: Disasters Cataclysm
description: Disasters Cataclysm is a global disaster mod for Minecraft (Fabric) that turns survival into a real challenge. The world is no longer safe: the elements can strike at any moment, but they do it beautifully and naturally.
body:
**Disasters Cataclysm** is a large-scale natural disaster mod for Minecraft (Fabric) that adds a whole spectrum of destructive and impressive natural phenomena to your world. Prepare to face meteorites falling from the sky, powerful earthquakes, dust storm, furious storms, giant whirlpools, tornadoes sweeping away everything in their path, devastating tsunamis, sudden landslides, and volcanic eruptions.

A key feature of the mod is its deep and flexible customization. Through a convenient .toml config file, you can control every aspect of the disasters in detail: from their frequency and intensity to specific behavioral rules and their impact on the world. This allows you to either create a true apocalypse or simply add a bit of unpredictability to your survival experience. Additionally, all events can be triggered manually with commands, which is ideal for map makers and server administrators.

A special emphasis is placed on preserving the vanilla feel. We have carefully designed all the effects and mechanics to feel like a natural part of the game. Instead of out-of-place elements, the mod uses and expands upon existing game features. As a result, the cataclysms don't break the original style but rather blend harmoniously into the world of vanilla Minecraft, making survival more interesting and challenging.

For the convenience of players from all over the world, the mod has full support for six languages: German (de_de), English (en_us), Spanish (es_es), French (fr_fr), Portuguese (pt_br), and Russian (ru_ru).

![Meteorite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CfHgMAvU/images/48273d8a1d5469b501ba2e9ae6971ebea435980e_350.webp)

![Tornado](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CfHgMAvU/images/9d2aef560e0496b1c17632e153e263e3a04ae5d7_350.webp)

![Dust storm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CfHgMAvU/images/a455220a9a7e9a94d722119bfc29a3ca2b97d544_350.webp)

_Example._

There are 13 cataclysms in total.

The mod can be controlled via the command:
/dc summon <type>
